methods.name: lesa.core.ollama_manager.OllamaManager.is_server_running
documentation: Checks if the Ollama server is running at the given URL.

methods.name: lesa.core.ollama_manager.OllamaManager.start_ollama_service
documentation: Starts the Ollama service based on the operating system.

methods.name: lesa.core.ollama_manager.OllamaManager.stop_ollama_service
documentation: Stops the Ollama service based on the current operating system.

classes.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentExtractor

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentExtractor.extract_text
documentation:
Abstract method to extract text from a document.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the document file

Returns:
    str: Extracted text from the document
Abstract base class for document text extraction.

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocxExtractor.extract_text
documentation:
Extract text from a Word document.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the .docx file

Returns:
    str: Extracted text from the document

classes.name: lesa.core.document_manager.PDFExtractor

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.PDFExtractor.extract_text
documentation:
Extract text from a PDF document.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the PDF file

Returns:
    str: Extracted text from the document
Extractor for PDF files using PyPDF2.

classes.name: lesa.core.document_manager.GenericTextExtractor

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.GenericTextExtractor.extract_text
documentation:
Extract text from various text-based document formats.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the document file

Returns:
    str: Extracted text from the document
Extractor for generic text-based files using textract.

classes.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize DocumentManager.

Args:
    directory (str, optional): Directory to scan. Defaults to current directory.

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.scan_documents
documentation:
Scan the directory for supported document types.

Returns:
    List[str]: List of supported document filenames

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.list_documents
documentation: Display the list of available documents with indices.

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.select_document
documentation:
Interactively select a document to extract text from.

Returns:
    Optional[str]: Path to the selected document, or None if no selection

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.extract_document_text
documentation:
Extract text from a document using the appropriate extractor.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the document

Returns:
    str: Extracted text from the document

methods.name: lesa.core.document_manager.DocumentManager.run
documentation: Main method to run the document manager interactive session.

Manages document selection and extraction.

Responsibilities:
- Scan directory for supported documents
- Provide document selection interface
